name: Solid Back, Empty Front
criterion: Headboard wall must be a windowless & doorless continuous wall surface.

name: Open Bright Hall
criterion: Obstacle-free area in front of sofa/bed must exceed a fraction of the horizontal field of view.

name: Door-Window Direct Alignment (Piercing Sha)
criterion: Angle between the door-center-to-window-center line and the horizontal must be below a threshold to flag direct alignment.

name: Mirror Not Facing Bed/Door
criterion: IoU between mirror bbox and bed/door bbox above a threshold indicates the mirror reflects directly onto the bed or door.

name: Beam Pressing Down
criterion: A horizontal dark band spanning a large fraction of the furniture's width, directly above a sofa/bed, indicates an exposed beam.

name: Left High, Right Low
criterion: Relative to the seated/facing orientation, the average height (prominence) of objects on the left side should exceed the right side.

name: Color Balance
criterion: Excessive warm-hue (red/orange) coverage should be balanced by recommending cool tones (blue/green).

name: Plants to Neutralize Sha
criterion: Recommend broad-leaf plants near detected sharp wall corners to soften their effect.

name: Dynamic-Static Separation
criterion: The dining table should not be placed directly adjacent to a bathroom door.

name: Wealth Area Should Be Bright
criterion: The diagonal corner opposite the entrance (the 'Ming Wealth Corner') should have the highest brightness/luminance among the room's regions.
